model_description: 3-way grid-search blend: xgb=0.45 + lgbm=0.35 + catboost=0.20. All models retrained on fixed parquets (train-median NaN fill, consistent LabelEncoder, GroupId dropped). lgbm uses 3-seed averaging. CatBoost uses native categorical handling.
note: New best OOF=0.8179. Previous sub_002 online=0.80102. Expect improvement.
